brand.name: De Diez a Dos
brand.description: Rental of elegant venues and full-service solutions for all kinds of events

slides.title: Your private space in the heart of Madrid
slides.description: At De Diez a Dos we turn every celebration into a unique experience. An exclusive venue with crafted catering, open bar, professional sound and a team that takes care of everything. You celebrate. We handle every detail.

slides.title: Unforgettable Moments
slides.description: The perfect venue for the most important day of your life. Unique spaces with personalized services to make your event a memorable day

slides.title: Corporate Events
slides.description: Professional venues for conferences, presentations, team building and corporate celebrations with full catering services

services.title: Professional Services
services.subtitle: Complete packages that include everything you need for your event

items.title: Exclusive Space
items.description: Venue with two exclusive spaces, private access and a fully reserved atmosphere. Comfortable furniture and adjustable lighting. We work with care and warmth, coordinating every detail so your event runs perfectly.

items.title: Audio-Visual System
items.description: Professional sound and high-quality screens already installed on site. Our technical team ensures everything works flawlessly during the event. Adjustable lighting and atmospheres tailored to your style: elegant, modern or festive. Quality and comfort, with no setup hassle.

items.title: Catering De Diez a Dos
items.description: Over 14 years listening to our clients and refining every proposal. The result: balanced, versatile menus designed to fit any occasion. Quality, fine presentation and options that work for every type of event.

items.title: Open Bar
items.description: Our bar adapts to every event. We offer different options depending on the package, so you can choose the format that best fits your celebration. Flexibility and professional service throughout.

items.title: Professional Staff
items.description: Bar staff, waiters and access control to ensure safety and comfort. An efficient, discreet team. Faced with any unexpected issue, we provide quick, quality solutions. Simple and resourceful service.

items.title: Additional Services
items.description: We offer optional extras to round out your event: custom decoration, DJ, dessert table, candy cart and Photomax 360. You choose what to add depending on what you want for the day, always with clear pricing and no surprises.

catering.title: Catering De Diez a Dos
catering.subtitle: Enjoy the wonderful attention and personalized treatment we offer at every event. Our team is dedicated to making your special occasion an unforgettable moment, taking care of every detail so you and your guests feel right at home.

items.title: We adapt to you
items.description: We design every event around your tastes and needs, so the space feels tailor-made for you.

items.title: Support at every step
items.description: We guide you before, during and after the event, answering questions and handling the details so you only worry about enjoying yourself.

items.title: Warmth and professionalism
items.description: We serve you with the trust of always and the seriousness your celebration deserves, blending warmth and organization.

items.title: Details that make the difference
items.description: From welcoming your guests to closing the event, every small gesture is designed to surprise and delight.

items.title: Comfortable and welcoming atmosphere
items.description: We create an intimate, pleasant atmosphere where your guests feel relaxed, welcome and looked after at all times.

items.title: Proactive service
items.description: We anticipate the needs of your event so everything flows naturally, with no improvisation or surprises.

gallery.title: Venues
gallery.subtitle: Discover our elegant venues, designed to create the perfect atmosphere for your special event

extras.title: Available Extras
extras.subtitle: Round out your event with additional services that make a difference

items.title: Karaoke
items.description: If you want a fun and engaging event, karaoke is perfect for groups of friends, birthdays and family celebrations.
items.recommendedFor: Birthdays, teen parties, farewells and mixed celebrations

items.title: PhotoMax 360
items.description: PhotoMax 360 is one of the most sought-after extras: you step onto the platform and videos are recorded with a stunning effect, perfect for social media.
items.recommendedFor: Birthdays, private parties, youth events and celebrations where you want top-tier production

items.title: Professional DJ
items.description: If you want your event to sound like a club but in your own style, you can add a professional DJ with music tailored to your audience.
features: Music tailored to the type of party
Entrance, build-up and closing of the event with hit tracks
items.recommendedFor: Big parties, adult birthdays, farewells and dance events

items.title: Dessert Table / Candy Bar
items.description: The dessert table is ideal if you want a beautiful, polished setup ready to enjoy. It adds an elegant touch and looks great in photos.
items.recommendedFor: Children's birthdays, communions and family events

items.title: Custom Decoration
items.description: Decoration makes the difference. You can make your event more beautiful and more "yours" with custom decoration: themes, colors, names, balloons and more.
items.recommendedFor: Birthdays, farewells, baby showers and all kinds of celebrations
